visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged Asian man with glasses, a grey flat cap, and a black shirt stands against a solid light blue background. He gestures energetically towards the camera while speaking. Large animated graphics of a Poké Ball and text overlays appear prominently on the screen. (2) The scene transitions to a high-quality 3D CGI animation showing a lush outdoor park environment. A winding dirt path leads through vibrant green fields and clusters of trees. Various Pokémon, including Pikachu, Charmander, and Bulbasaur, are depicted interacting with the environment and human-like avatars in the background. (3) The man reappears in the studio setting, now presenting a detailed graphic table that compares different ticket types. He uses his hands to emphasize points while a variety-style text subtitle appears at the bottom. The lighting is consistent, bright studio lighting. (4) More CGI footage is shown, featuring a Pikachu stage performance with flashing yellow lightning effects and a large park entrance with a Poké Ball-themed logo. The video concludes with the man pointing at the camera, followed by a final graphic showing the year 2026 and a Pikachu illustration.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 去吧! 就決定是你了! [Logo]: 3c有趣思tim哥, @3ctim. (2) [Subtitle]: 2026年2月5日 東京寶可夢樂園 正式開幕. (3) [Subtitle]: 這是全球首座 戶外常設型 寶可夢主題樂園. (4) [Subtitle]: 一踏進園區 彷彿來到 關都地區. (5) [Subtitle]: 園區分為 寶可夢森林 和草紗鎮 兩大主區. (6) [Subtitle]: 森林區以冒險為主 限持有 訓練家通行證 才能入場 5歲以下禁止進入. (7) [Subtitle]: 草紗鎮則是復刻遊戲裡面 寶可夢中心還有商店. (8) [Subtitle]: 門票11/21開賣! (9) [Subtitle]: 記得分為有三種票價. (10) [Subtitle]: 精英訓練家通行證 14000日圓 (約2780台幣) 可以自由進出兩大主區. (11) [Subtitle]: 外加有一個特別的 迎賓會、道館表演 相關的預約席特典. (12) [Subtitle]: 訓練家通行證 7900日圓 (約1570台幣) 它可以指定時段進入森林一次. (13) [Subtitle]: 而草紗鎮它就是不限任何時候 都可以進去. (14) [Subtitle]: 小鎮通行證 只能進到草紗鎮 但3歲以下幼童 免費入場. (15) [Subtitle]: 不過要等到2026年夏天 才準備開賣. (16) [Subtitle]: 準備好抓寶了嗎? 我已經準備好了 2026 東京見!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male presenter in studio; several animated humanoid figures in CGI background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged man wearing glasses, a patterned grey flat cap, a black short-sleeved button-down shirt, and a wooden bead bracelet on his right wrist.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Primary background is a flat, light blue studio wall. Secondary backgrounds include animated 3D environments representing a Pokémon-themed park with trees, paths, and colorful buildings resembling a Pokémon Center.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy male vocal exclamation, immediately followed by an upbeat, medium-tempo electronic pop track. The voice is clear, with a professional broadcasting quality and a rising intonation that suggests excitement. (2) As the narrator delivers information about the theme park, short "whoosh" sound effects are heard during scene transitions, and subtle "ping" sound effects accentuate the appearance of text on the screen. The BGM remains constant, providing a steady, driving rhythmic bed. (3) A faint layer of synthesized crowd cheering is blended into the mix during descriptions of the park areas, though it remains well below the primary vocal signal. The narrator maintains a fast but clear speech rate throughout. (4) The track concludes with a final energetic vocal phrase and a swelling musical coda that ends abruptly with a soft digital chime SFX.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Information (Areas/Features) -> Details (Pricing/Dates) -> Call to Action.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To announce and promote the opening of a new outdoor Pokémon theme park in Tokyo, providing viewers with essential details such as the opening date, park zones, and ticket pricing to generate anticipation.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly produced short-form informative video combining direct-to-camera narration with CGI visualizations of the subject matter.
